  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'clean this up' primarily targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and grammar.",
    "RX.1": "We should surface any interpretation uncertainties about what 'clean up' entails to avoid unintended changes.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must avoid introducing or amplifying claims beyond what the artifact supports.",
    "RX.3": "Work must remain within writing polish and presentation improvements, not broader content changes.",
    "RX.4": "Polishing should not create misleading impressions about guarantees or performance that could cause misuse.",
    "RX.5": "Any changes should be traceable to the original text to preserve provenance and accountability."
  }
}

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'clean this up' primarily targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and grammar.
rationale.RX.1: We should surface any interpretation uncertainties about what 'clean up' entails to avoid unintended changes.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must avoid introducing or amplifying claims beyond what the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: Work must remain within writing polish and presentation improvements, not broader content changes.
rationale.RX.4: Polishing should not create misleading impressions about guarantees or performance that could cause misuse.
rationale.RX.5: Any changes should be traceable to the original text to preserve provenance and accountability.
